sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94245" key="sinopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐνοποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n94245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hurtful</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῴδια, ἀστήρ</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.147</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.163</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
